changes.value:
## What
Replace `backendDispatch` (1 call) in `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/context-menu.ts`. Special case: `dispatchContextMenuCommand` is a module-level function, not a hook. The scope chain is captured at menu-open time (`pendingScopeChain`). Options:
- Accept a dispatch function as parameter from `useContextMenu` (the hook caller)
- Or keep using the private `_backendDispatch` with the captured scope chain since this is the one legitimate non-hook case

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No imports of `backendDispatch` (public export)
- [ ] Context menu dispatch still uses the scope chain captured at menu-open time

## Tests
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm test` — all unit tests pass
